title: Drinkchart Incident Tree Config
description: A versioned, deterministic question tree for incident logging. The app renders any valid config generically; shipping a new tree version is a config push, never an app release. tools/lint-tree.mjs enforces the semantic rules this schema cannot express (spawn-target existence, no cycles, depth <= 3, floor <= 3 per branch, reachability).

tree_version.description: Monotonically increasing per flow family. Answers persist with the version they were captured under.

flow.description: incident = the four-branch capture tree (floor <= 3 per branch). linear = a single ordered flow (e.g. onboarding; floor <= 8, branch key 'main' with a 'sequence'). Lint enforces the per-flow rules.

branches.description: incident flow: exactly live/drank/resisted/delayed. linear flow: exactly 'main'. floor = the required minimum; everything else is invited and skippable.

tag_rules.description: Deterministic cross-node tagging (e.g. B4 x O1 -> broke_own_rule). Evaluated in code when the referenced answer or the arc outcome changes; resulting tags persist on the arc.

scoring.description: Scored instruments (e.g. AUDIT-C). Thresholds are CONFIG VALUES, never code. Score = sum of the selected option's 'score' across sum_of nodes; band = highest band whose (gender-specific or default) minimum the score meets.

id.description: Stable forever. Never reuse or repurpose an id across tree versions. Lowercase suffix marks a drill-down of its parent (B1a drills into B1).

moment.description: entry..metrics are incident moments; profile/audit/goal are linear-flow (onboarding) sections.

input_type.description: 'tap' extends the spec's implicit entry type (E1/E2). 'chips' renders like single but styled as quick bands.

options.description: Required for single/multi/chips; forbidden for tap/number/text (lint enforces).

required.description: Only floor nodes may be required (lint enforces): depth is invited, never required.

default_value.description: Preselected option value (must be one of options[].value). Counts as answered without a tap — e.g. onboarding goal defaults to understand_my_drinking.

allow_secondary.description: single only. Lets the user add one optional secondary choice (B1: primary driver + optional secondary).

allow_free_text.description: Adds an optional free-text companion field (the spec's 'single+text' / 'multi+text').

card_group.description: Nodes sharing a card_group render on one card (B3A place + B3B company = the spec's B3 'two singles').

value.description: Stable forever; what persists in answers.value. Never repurpose.

requires_text.description: Selecting this option opens a text field (e.g. 'other').

requires_number.description: Selecting this option opens numeric entry (QTY 'exact').

requires_datetime.description: Selecting this option opens a date-time picker (T1 'pick date & time').

score.description: Instrument score contributed when this option is selected (AUDIT-C items: 0-4). Every option of a node referenced by scoring.*.sum_of must carry one (lint enforces).

spawn_rule.description: Exactly one of then_node | then_branch | then_action (lint enforces). then_branch redirects the arc into another branch's floor + cards (D1 resolution); then_action 'keep_open' leaves the arc open with no further nodes.

if_value.description: An option value of this node, or '*' for any answer.

floor.description: Ordered required minimum. 'Done' is visible the moment the floor is met. Lint enforces <= 3 for incident flows (spec rule) and <= 8 for linear flows (Brief 003).

sequence.description: linear flows only: every node of the flow in display order (floor nodes plus skippable optionals).

cards.description: Invited, skippable cards per moment, in display order.

entry_chips.description: Quick chips offered immediately on entry (live urge: B2, B3A, B3B), then the app backs off.

if_value_in.description: Option values of the node — or, for tap nodes (which have no options), the tap sentinel 'tapped' (E1 -> live_capture).

if_outcome.description: Optional additional condition on the arc's effective outcome.

add_tag.description: snake_case, per the rev B naming ruling (broke_own_rule, delayed_first, live_capture).

sum_of.description: Node ids whose selected-option scores are summed.

bands.description: band name -> minimum score, overall or per gender value with a 'default' fallback. Highest band whose minimum the score meets wins; below every band = 'none'.

provisional.description: True until clinical review signs the thresholds off.
